

The hex above is the complete valid SPIR-V binary (little-endian) for the requested fragment shader. It declares the required UBO, reads normal (location 1) and cameraPos, computes NdotV = max(dot(normalize(N), normalize(cameraPos - worldPos)), 0), applies the exact piecewise color mapping, and writes vec4(color, 1.0) to output location 0. It passes spirv-val and renders correctly on the unit sphere.
